meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build a high-impact portfolio. An intermediate-level guide for students to showcase real-world development skills.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends by shipping production-grade AI agents. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transition from theoretical student to a technical practitioner. This workflow automates project scaffolding and architectural design, allowing you to build, deploy, and showcase complex SaaS applications that demonstrate actual professional engineering competency.
content.intro:
The screen glows with the cold blue light of a blank repository. You have the degree, the tutorials, and the ambition, but the silence of an empty GitHub profile is deafening. In the industry, 'no portfolio' is the invisible wall between a graduate and an engineer. You aren't lacking talent; you are lacking a mechanism to manifest your ideas at speed.

Today, we shatter that wall. We are moving beyond basic scripts into orchestrated development. By pairing Claude Code’s autonomous reasoning with Antigravity’s structural efficiency, you will turn a weekend of effort into a professional showcase. This is how you stop being a student and start being a builder.

steps.title: Environment Orchestration
steps.description: Initialize your project structure to ensure modularity and scalability from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a professional SaaS project structure using a clean architecture pattern. Include directories for core, services, and tests.

steps.title: Defining the Domain Model
steps.description: Use AI to define robust data schemas, ensuring your backend is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a relational schema for a multi-tenant user management system. Output as a Prisma schema file.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema for user auth and role-based access'

steps.title: Implementing Core Logic
steps.description: Streamline the development of business logic by iterating through Claude Code's autonomous feedback loops.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service layer function that handles secure token exchange and session validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'Implement core Auth service layer'

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Prove your professional standards by integrating comprehensive unit tests into your workflow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test coverage for the Auth service, mocking database calls and edge cases.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests for auth.service.ts'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Finalize your build by configuring CI/CD files that show recruiters you understand DevOps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, tests, and builds the container image.

pro_tips: Always commit with descriptive, imperative-mood messages; recruiters scan your commit history to verify your workflow maturity.
Use Antigravity to generate a README.md that focuses on 'why' you chose your stack, not just 'how' you built it.
Configure Claude Code to ignore node_modules and build artifacts to maintain a clean, readable repository.
Periodically ask Claude Code to review your own code for security vulnerabilities to showcase a 'security-first' mindset.
Leverage the 'Claude Code' context window to draft technical documentation for your project; it serves as a great supplement to your resume.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, deploy it to Vercel or Railway, document the architecture in a blog post, and link it directly to your LinkedIn profile.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the technical leverage to build faster and more reliably than your peers. Stop waiting for permission to be an engineer; start shipping the projects that define your career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
